chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1716 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For katcha peshi. 17-01-2018 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto A.A.G. Sindh. This is second call. This petition is called for hearing. Neither petitioner nor her counsel is present. No intimation received. It is now 11.10 a.m. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing viz. 18.02.2016 and 17.03.2016. It appears that perhaps the petitioner has lost interest in the matter. We have gone through the case file showing that in the present case the petitioner has prayed for protection of her life and property as she had married to one Jam Khan and due to this marriage, the private respondents were not happy, therefore, she has filed this petition. As observed above, none present for the petitioner, as such, this petition is disposed with direction to official respondents to make sure that there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioner in violation of law. JUDGE JUDGE
